--- quantified.sql
(a:Person)-[:KNOWS]-{1, 3}(b:Person)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Rparen:  9,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 1,
                  NameEnd: 2,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
                Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                  IS:    -1,
                  Colon: 2,
                  Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                    Name: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 3,
                      NameEnd: 9,
                      Name:    "Person",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  10,
              EndPos:    20,
              Direction: "ANY",
              Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                  IS:    -1,
                  Colon: 12,
                  Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                    Name: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 13,
                      NameEnd: 18,
                      Name:    "KNOWS",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
              Lbrace: 20,
              Rbrace: 25,
              Low:    &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 21,
                ValueEnd: 22,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "1",
              },
              High: &ast.IntLiteral{
                ValuePos: 24,
                ValueEnd: 25,
                Base:     10,
                Value:    "3",
              },
              Comma: 22,
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  26,
              Rparen:  35,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 27,
                  NameEnd: 28,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
                Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                  IS:    -1,
                  Colon: 28,
                  Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                    Name: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 29,
                      NameEnd: 35,
                      Name:    "Person",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a:Person)-[:KNOWS]-{1,3}(b:Person)
